{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230404001F7DAB69259A4D1EC976"}"},"total":4870},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7177000619478500148","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本小说，整体大纲脉络挺细的，环环相扣，严丝合缝[捂脸]！主角跟很多主配角都写的很鲜活，每个配角人设都挺细的，有灵有魂，最后写到现实世界材料片的时候就开始高潮燃起，贼得劲。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671025750,"group_id":"7080794060528552991","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6mcRd36DpceHhkOBnIVnyo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd4a578456cc47dfbd0de8aac5d709cc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787653&x-signature=eYjplX5BFetPDJXwOX%2FCfwV7OiI%3D","user_id":"64729659880","user_name":"爱吃杂蔬饼的玉鼎藤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"64729659880","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7080794060528552991","book_info":{"abstract":"（皇帝召唤+第四天灾！幽默爆笑！无敌爽文！）
地球游戏策划师秦汉穿越了！成为了大汉皇朝的皇帝！
龙床上躺着贵妃，城外是大量乱军，系统还催着他召唤玩家......
此情此景，怎么办？
那必须是召唤玩家，杀光叛军，再搂着贵妃，看玩家们为他征服天下！
醒掌天下权，醉卧美人膝。
打造最强修仙军队，第四天灾出征，让天下修仙者都看到地球玩家的恐怖！
地球玩家们：“我们的口号是：在伟大的汉皇指引下，杀空每一根血条！”
来自地球的玩家们，在仙侠世界里杀疯了！
横扫九州修仙界，重振强汉之荣光！
杀入仙门换天地，仙人见朕也低头！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/416b3dbe103d043489c4ab487db1a418","author":"我是欧皇","author_id":"","book_id":"7080794060528552991","book_name":"玩家召唤：朕即是天灾","book_short_name":"朕即是天灾","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7080801294679704098","read_count":"19567","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1558298"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"542","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无敌,架空,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/64896dafea8262b0d8993bdc4fae0b85~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393840&x-signature=l0lBdc9IGGK%2B%2FNAmNM1woGhKxgA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3633245736407588","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.19201199e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230404001F7DAB69259A4D1EC976"}"},"relate_info_list"
